visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a male host in a studio setting. He wears a pink Roots t-shirt, a black flat cap, and glasses. He points towards the camera as a large green LINE logo graphic appears in the center. The background consists of vertical grey curtains and soft studio lighting. (2) The scene shifts to a retail environment. A close-up shot shows hands holding two vivo smartphone boxes (V29 5G and Y100 5G) against a backdrop of shop displays. The lighting is bright and cool-toned. (3) The host is seen again, this time standing in a mobile phone shop (Miko) behind a clear plastic partition. He gestures towards the shelves of accessories and phones. (4) The video returns to the studio setting with the grey curtains. As the host speaks, various motion graphics appear, including cartoon icons of a police officer, a hacker in a hoodie, a thief, and warning symbols. He uses hand gestures to emphasize his points while pink and white text overlays flash at the bottom of the screen.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Logo]: miko米可手機館. [Subtitle]: LINE如果收到這三句話. (2) [Variety]: 趕快封鎖對方. [Variety]: ⚠. (3) [Variety]: 因為是詐騙!. (4) [Slogan]: 推薦大家買手機到米可. (5) [Subtitle]: 2200萬的用戶. (6) [Subtitle]: 第一!. [Subtitle]: 不要點選再次登入. (7) [Subtitle]: 安全機制. (8) [Subtitle]: 第二! 刪除LINE App 才能防毒. (9) [Subtitle]: 第三! 系統繁忙 稍後再次登入. (10) [Variety]: 詐騙猖獗 大家千萬要多加警惕.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host appearing in studio and store scenes.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged male with glasses, wearing a pink t-shirt with a green leaf logo (Roots brand) and a black flat cap.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional studio with grey vertical curtains and a secondary location inside a bright mobile phone retail shop with glass display cases.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator begins speaking in Traditional Chinese with an authoritative and friendly tone. An upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop BGM starts simultaneously, providing a driving rhythmic bed. The recording is studio-clean with no audible background noise. (2) A synthetic 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition between points. The narrator's speech rate is fast and clear, with expressive pitch variations to maintain viewer engagement. The music maintains a constant volume beneath the speech. (3) A digital 'pop' sound effect occurs as text and graphics appear on screen, synchronized with the narration. The speaker's arousal level is high, conveying a sense of warning and expertise. (4) The track concludes with a brief summary statement. The BGM maintains its energy until a sharp hard cut at the very end of the video. The overall mix is professionally balanced for social media consumption.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Promotion -> Educational List -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves to educate LINE users about common scam tactics while simultaneously endorsing 'Miko' mobile phone shops. It leverages the host's tech-expert persona to provide credible warnings and safety tips.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The host explicitly recommends buying phones at Miko and features their logo and store environment prominently.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-density editing typical of short-form vertical video, using frequent text overlays and SFX to maintain attention.
